item.title: About Me
item.description: I’m an experienced software developer with expertise in machine learning and data science techniques, including Python, Java, TensorFlow, and SQL. With over 1.5 years of experience, I’ve developed and implemented innovative solutions for prestigious institutions such as AIIMS Hospitals. For instance, I designed and implemented recommendation systems for a health management information system that enabled doctors to give precise prescriptions to patients and reduced possible medication errors. I’m also proficient in computer vision and deep learning.

item.title: Project I: Parking Space Detection
item.description: I am currently working on a parking space detection system for a port in Busan, South Korea. My goal is to design & develop a technology-based solution to optimize the crane’s usage and increase the efficiency of the container unloading process. The system leverages computer vision techniques such as object detection and tracking to monitor the availability of parking spaces near the crane that unloads containers. The system is designed to automatically detect and track trucks as they approach and leave the parking spaces, and to detect when a space becomes available.

item.title: Project II: Recommendation System
item.description: The recommendation system that I have implemented utilizes machine learning algorithms to analyze a patient’s medical history, current symptoms, and other relevant factors to generate personalized suggestions for diagnoses and medications. For example, if a patient has a history of allergies or adverse reactions to certain medications, the system will take this information into account and avoid recommending those medications. Currently, I am working on improving the system’s performance by implementing a more complex algorithm for data processing.

item.title: Project III: Django Web App
item.description: The interactive machine learning application mentioned in this project is designed to offer researchers and data scientists an easy-to-use tool that streamlines the workflow for creating and testing ML models. The user-friendly interface of the application allows users to perform tasks such as training and testing of models with just a few clicks. The application has been designed with flexibility in mind, allowing users to upload their own preprocessed datasets or use the internal dataset provided.

item.title: Project IV: Galaxy Classification
item.description: In astronomy, the study of galaxies is an important field that helps us understand the evolution of the universe. Classifying galaxies into different types, such as elliptical, spiral, and irregular, is a key task in this field. However, manually classifying galaxies is a time-consuming and challenging task, which is why machine learning models have been developed to automate the process. This project involves developing a machine learning model that accurately classifies galaxies into different types.

item.title: Project V: Image Captioning Generator
item.description: The Image Captioning Generator is a project I worked on that involves the development of a neural network model capable of generating captions for input images. This project was particularly interesting to me because it required a combination of two different problems: language modeling and image classification. To tackle this challenge, I used two different neural network architectures: a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network. The CNN was used for image classification, while the LSTM was used for language modeling.
